creator: gav303@hotmail.com
text:
The pkg-message for webmin gives you the command for REconfiguring webmin, but doesn't mention that this needs to be run to provide an initial configuration as well before starting webmin. It kind of implies that the initial configuration is done for you ready to start webmin, and the script is only needed for future changes.

Fix: 

Change pkg-message slightly to refer to configuration rather than reconfiguration
How-To-Repeat: 	Install webmin port from /usr/ports/sysutils/webmin
